name: The Exhibit: Finding the Next Great Artist
original_name: The Exhibit: Finding the Next Great Artist
overview: Seven up-and-coming artists create original pieces that explore social issues for the chance to win $100,000 and show their work at the Smithsonian's Hirshhorn Museum and Sculpture Garden in this competition series judged by art-world insiders.

trailers.title: The Exhibit: Finding The Next Great Artist | Trailer
